title: SwarmKit Fleet Join Request
description: Mode B (instance → panel) join request body for panel `POST /fleet/join`. A NAT'd instance the panel can't reach presents a one-time join code (the auth) plus its identity and full state, in one outbound call. See design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md (§Mode B).

join_code.description: The one-time join code the operator minted (single-use, TTL-bounded).

instance_identity.description: How the instance names itself to the fleet.

instance_state.description: The instance's full observed state, cached by the panel at join.
